name: standards/fetchers/http-get.sh emits URL content to stdout (generic upstream stub for standards/fetcher.sh dispatch)
command: OUT=/tmp/cl564-r05-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && printf 'hello world payload\n' > $OUT/payload.txt; URL="file://$OUT/payload.txt" bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetchers/http-get.sh" > got.out 2>/dev/null; RC=$?; [ "$RC" = "0" ] && grep -q 'hello world payload' got.out && echo http-get-fetches-url 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
